seed_papers.reason: Au-SiO2 core-shell nanoparticles/nanorods with tunable silica shell thickness.
One-pot Au@SiO2 core-shell synthesis focused on shell thickness.
Open-access optimization of Au@SiO2 core-shell nanostructures.
Open-access silica-coated gold nanoparticles; useful morphology variation.
Au and Au@SiO2 comparison; useful clean examples and controls.

local_pdf_sources.title: The Optimization of the One-Pot Synthesis of Au@SiO2 Core-Shell Nanostructures: Modification with Dansyl Group and Their Fluorescent Properties
local_pdf_sources.notes: Strong Au@SiO2 core-shell candidate; TEM figures with optimization of shell-forming route.

local_pdf_sources.title: Comparative Analysis of Au and Au@SiO2 Nanoparticle-Protein Interactions for Evaluation as Platforms in Theranostic Applications
local_pdf_sources.notes: Useful comparative Au vs Au@SiO2 examples; verify article reuse rights before public demo.

local_pdf_sources.title: Synthesis of gold-silica core-shell nanoparticles by pulsed laser ablation in liquid and their physico-chemical properties towards photothermal cancer therapy
local_pdf_sources.notes: Core-shell PLAL route; likely valuable for real_exact if TEM figures are separable.

local_pdf_sources.title: Tunable Response of Silica-Gold Nanoparticles for Improved Efficiency in Photothermal Therapy
local_pdf_sources.notes: Reported AuNP@SiO2-like morphology with thin silica shell; review figures before class assignment.

local_pdf_sources.title: Highly sensitive near-infrared SERS nanoprobes for in vivo imaging using gold-assembled silica nanoparticles with controllable nanogaps
local_pdf_sources.notes: SiO2@Au@Au decorated/assembled morphology; useful for decorated model, not core-shell v0.

local_pdf_sources.title: Gold decoration of silica by decomposition of aqueous gold(iii) hydroxide at low temperatures
local_pdf_sources.notes: Silica spheres decorated with AuNPs; good future Au_decoration/SiO2_carrier source.

local_pdf_sources.file: Examples/pdfs TEM/Photothermal conversion of SiO2@Au nanoparticles mediated by surface morphology of gold cluster layer.pdf
local_pdf_sources.title: Photothermal conversion of SiO2@Au nanoparticles mediated by surface morphology of gold cluster layer
local_pdf_sources.notes: SiO2@Au cluster-layer morphology; useful for decorated/coverage analysis.

local_pdf_sources.title: Simple synthesis of gold-decorated silica nanoparticles by in situ precipitation method with new plasmonic properties
local_pdf_sources.notes: Inhomogeneous/discontinuous Au over silica; useful for decorated future class, not core-shell v0.

local_pdf_sources.title: Fabrication and Characterization of Au-Decorated MCM-41 Mesoporous Spheres Using Laser-Ablation Technique
local_pdf_sources.notes: Au-decorated mesoporous spheres; useful as support/decorated morphology.

local_pdf_sources.title: Preparation of SiO2@Au Nanoparticle Photonic Crystal Array as Surface-Enhanced Raman Scattering (SERS) Substrate
local_pdf_sources.notes: Manufacturing sequence for SiO2, Au seeds, and SiO2@Au; useful future decorated source.

local_pdf_sources.title: Interface-Induced Near-Infrared Response of Gold-Silica Hybrid Nanoparticles Antennas
local_pdf_sources.notes: HR-STEM/EELS interface examples; useful for near-field/decorated morphology review.

local_pdf_sources.title: Gold nanoparticles decorated biguanidine modified mesoporous silica KIT-5 as recoverable heterogeneous catalyst for the reductive degradation of environmental contaminants
local_pdf_sources.notes: KIT-5 mesoporous support with dispersed Au; near/negative for decorated, not core-shell v0.

local_pdf_sources.title: On-chip monitoring of toxic gases: capture and label-free SERS detection with plasmonic mesoporous sorbents
local_pdf_sources.notes: Mesoporous plasmonic sorbents; useful as related/negative morphology.

local_pdf_sources.title: A gold nanoparticle-intercalated mesoporous silica-based nanozyme for the selective colorimetric detection of dopamine
local_pdf_sources.notes: Au inside/near mesoporous silica; related but not core-shell.

local_pdf_sources.title: Nanospherical Surface-Supported Seeded Growth of Au Nanowires: Investigation on a New Growth Mechanism and High-Performance Hydrogen Peroxide Sensors
local_pdf_sources.notes: Au nanowire growth on spherical support; likely outside Au@SiO2 core-shell v0.
